ops.title: Add investigation entity kind (timeline + verdict primitive)
ops.description: New first-class entity kind `investigation`: immutable premise, append-only evidence timeline (LogEntry reuse), criterion-style findings with dispositions (open/confirmed/cleared), LWW status (open/root_caused/fixed/confirmed/exonerated/abandoned), RootCause + resolution Body, FixCommits, FollowUps, attachments. Replaces the note-edited-to-RESOLVED anti-pattern (e.g. daemonkit note b983140). Approved plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-06/plans/bash-cd-users-yasyf-code-daemonkit-hashed-dream.md. Ships as one atomic green commit (Kinds()-keyed exhaustiveness gates force full threading: model/fold/refs/store/notes/cli/mcpserver/viz/fusefs/plugin).

ops.text: go build ./... (pure, -tags fuse, -tags webui) and go test -race -count=1 ./... green with the new kind fully threaded
daemonkit story end-to-end: open → append+attach → finding clear → root-cause → fix → confirm → show/status/search/relevant/history all render the arc
MCP cross-check gates green: reverse, inventory, docs (cli-reference.md), redirect (redirect.py)
plugin threading: SKILL.md + cli-reference.md sections, record.py nudges with proofs in test_cc_notes.py, capt-hook test green
